en.tool.description: Get detailed info about a specific UPnP device by its description URL (location) or IP address. Returns device metadata, service list, and device tree (sub-devices).
en.param.ip.description: Device IP address (used with optional port to build a description URL).
en.param.port.description: Port number (used with ip). Default: 5000 (common UPnP port).
